contract: files changed, routes generated, commands run, build result

artifact.specialistMapping: content-writer -> vendored seo-content-writer (Yahya decision). Site BUILD performed by the localevolve-factory engine (init -> wire -> build); content authored from the approved Phase 2 matrix.
artifact.resumeContext: Resumed after the F12 engine fix (restaurant route templates now ship). F13 collision (schema floor vs bare-bones business) resolved with declared .example test fixtures — see build/phase-4-fixture-decision.md.

commandsRun.note: re-scaffolded with the new restaurant route templates (menu/[slug], occasions/[slug], neighborhoods/[slug], [slug], menu/index, contact)

validated business.json + site.json against Zod schemas; emitted 6 SEO artifacts (llms.txt, llms-full.txt, robots.txt, localbusiness.jsonld [@type Restaurant], website.jsonld, internal-links.json). Legacy-mode advisory (no graph) only.
32 page(s) built in 2.88s; sitemap-index.xml created. dist/ verified: 32 index.html pages.

buildResult.note: The approved 32-page Phase 2 matrix built exactly — the F12 engine fix (restaurant route templates) is verified end-to-end by a real astro build. The engine's Phase-2 matrix is the acceptance fixture and it is satisfied 32/32.

buildCopyConstraintsApplied: Dine-in CORRECTED at build time (Phase 3 artifact was sealed): /faq and /how-to-order state 'a dining room at the storefront, but counter-service and takeout-first' — NO dine-in service claim.
/occasions/late-night reframed to 'Open Late' with exact hours (10pm Mon-Thu, 11pm Fri-Sat); no comparative claims.
No menu prices rendered (owner-unverified; menu ships priceless -> Menu JSON-LD correctly omitted since not all items priced).
Call-only CTA site-wide (ctaPrimary tel:, no ctaSecondary SMS).
Lead form dropped: /contact ships phone + address + hours + map/directions only (site.leadForm omitted).
Trust grid omitted site-wide (<6 real facts; site.trustBar omitted).
Delivery apps (DoorDash/Uber Eats/Grubhub/Postmates) named in prose, not internal routes.

fixtureValuesUsed.note: These would fail the Phase 5 do-not-ship gate BY DESIGN. Real data (maps/directions URLs to 1616, Facebook sameAs) authored normally.

minorObservations: hoursSchema is 2-bucket (weekday + sunday); Captains' 3-window hours (Mon-Thu / Fri-Sat / Sun) are lossy in the structured openingHours (weekday=Mon-Thu, sunday=Sun; Fri-Sat's later close lives in displayText only, which IS accurate). Candidate minor finding (F14?) if a 3rd bucket matters for openingHoursSpecification fidelity.
artifact.handoffToPhase5: Out of scope for this test run (paused at the build-quality review gate). When resumed, Phase 5 validate WILL flag the fixture do-not-ship values (domain/email/.example, gaId placeholder) by design, plus surface the hours-coarseness observation.
